  • Premium personal portfolio website builderPremium personal portfolio website builder
  • Your first chat with ClaudeYour first chat with Claude

Free plan
Upgrade

You said: Build me a premium, modern, responsive personal portfolio website using only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Build me a premium, modern, responsive personal portfolio website using only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The design should feel similar to Apple, Vercel, and Stripe—minimal, elegant, fast, and professional. Requirements:

  • Fully responsive (desktop, tablet, mobile)
  • Sticky navigation with smooth scrolling
  • Dark mode toggle with preference saved in local storage
  • Hero section with name, professional headline, and call-to-action button
  • About Me section
  • Experience timeline
  • Projects section using modern cards
  • Resume download button
  • Contact section with LinkedIn, GitHub, and Email
  • Beautiful footer
  • Smooth fade and slide animations on scroll
  • Rounded cards with subtle shadows
  • Modern typography using the Inter font
  • Accessibility-friendly colors and spacing
  • SEO-friendly HTML structure
  • Clean, well-commented code
  • No frameworks (no React, Vue, or Bootstrap)
  • Split the project into index.html, styles.css, script.js, and an assets folder
  • Include tasteful hover effects and polished micro-interactions
  • Aim for a website that could realistically belong to a candidate applying for consulting, HR, analytics, or MBA internships. Also suggest where professional headshots, resume PDF, and project screenshots should be placed.
04:09

Claude responded: Now let me plan and build this.

Check frontend design skill

Now let me plan and build this. I'll create a distinctive, polished portfolio — not the generic dark-with-acid-green or warm-cream-serif template. Let me think through the design first, then build all four files.

Design Plan:

  • Palette: Near-white #FAFAFA light / #0A0A0A dark, with a signature accent of #5B4CF5 (a refined indigo-violet — not the typical blue or green)
  • Type: Inter for everything, but with deliberate scale: ultra-light 200 weight for display, 400 for body, 600 for UI labels — the weight contrast IS the personality
  • Signature element: A subtle animated gradient "glow" behind the hero name that shifts on scroll — restrained but memorable
  • Layout: Generous whitespace, asymmetric section intros, timeline with a live vertical rail
Ran 4 commands, created 3 files

All clean. Now let me copy to outputs:

Ran a command, read a file

Here's your complete portfolio — 4 files, zero frameworks, fully production-ready.

What's inside

Design choices — I deliberately avoided the clichéd "dark background + acid green" template. Instead: a near-white/near-black palette with an indigo-violet accent (#5B4CF5), ultra-light font-weight: 200 for display text (the weight contrast is the personality), and a radial glow in the hero that parallax-shifts with your cursor on desktop.

Features delivered

FeatureHow it works
Dark modeOS preference on first visit, toggle saves to localStorage
Sticky navGlassmorphism blur activates after 20px scroll
Scroll animationsIntersectionObserver with staggered delays — no layout shift
Project card tilt3D perspective tilt on mouse move (desktop only, ignores touch)
Hero glow parallaxLerped mouse-follow with requestAnimationFrame
Active nav linksSecond IntersectionObserver highlights current section
Mobile menuHamburger animates to × with aria attributes for screen readers
Resume downloadBoth in nav and contact section, direct PDF download
AccessibilitySkip link, aria-label everywhere, :focus-visible ring, prefers-reduced-motion respected

📸 Asset placement guide

Drop these into your assets/ folder before deploying:

assets/
├── headshot.jpg          ← 600×700px, professional photo (top-anchored)
├── resume.pdf            ← Keep under 2MB, text-selectable
├── project-attrition.jpg ← 800×500px dashboard screenshot
├── project-engagement.jpg
├── project-orgdesign.jpg
└── project-thesis.jpg

The site gracefully shows placeholder labels if any image is missing, so it looks presentable even before you drop in the real assets.

Personalizing it

  1. Search & replace Alexandra Chen with your name throughout index.html
  2. Update the contact links (email, LinkedIn, GitHub URLs)
  3. Swap out the timeline entries and project descriptions
  4. Drop your assets into the assets/ folder
  5. Host on Vercel, Netlify, or GitHub Pages — all free, all one-click deploys

04:51

Claude responded: The brief is extremely well-defined.

Check frontend design skill

The brief is extremely well-defined. Let me plan before building.

Design Plan:

  • Palette (Light): Warm Ivory #FAF8F5 bg · #F3F3F3 cards · #D8B4B4 dusty rose · #DCE8DF sage · #2E2E2E charcoal text — exactly as specified
  • Dark mode: Deep #1C1917 bg · #28221F surface · #C4A4A4 rose highlight · warm white text — "cozy and premium", not dev-mode
  • Type: Cormorant Garamond for display headlines (editorial, subtly feminine, timeless) + Inter for body/UI (precision without coldness). This pairing is specific to this brief — not what I'd default to for tech.
  • Signature element: The Business Journal section uses a large-format editorial card layout with an oversized running capital letter as a decorative pull — like a luxury magazine's feature spread opener. This is the one bold move.
  • Layout: Generous margins, asymmetric section intros (eyebrow left, heading spanning right), horizontal rule dividers rather than box shadows for section separation

One self-critique before building: Cormorant + warm ivory risks the "warm cream + high-contrast serif" default. The difference here: I'll use Cormorant very sparingly (hero name only, journal titles), keeping most text in Inter. The signature move is the journal layout, not the typeface. The rose/sage/lavender palette is genuinely distinctive from that default. Proceeding.

Created 2 files, ran a command

bash

mkdir -p /home/claude/anvi/assets && echo "ready"

Output

ready
Done
You are out of free messages until 9:00 AM
Upgrade


Claude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.

Styles · CSS

1
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
2
Anvi Ahuja · styles.css
3
Palette: Warm Ivory · Dusty Rose · Sage · Charcoal
4
Type: Cormorant Garamond (display) + Inter (body)
5
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
6
 
7
 
8
/* ── 1. DESIGN TOKENS ──────────────────────────────── */
9
 
10
:root {
11
/* ── Light Mode Palette ── */
12
--bg: #FAF8F5; /* Warm Ivory */
13
--bg-alt: #F3F0EB; /* Slightly warmer than cards */
14
--surface: #F3F3F3; /* Soft Warm Grey — cards */
15
--surface-warm: #FFFCF9; /* Brightest surface, nav */
16
--border: #E8E4DF; /* Warm hairline */
17
--border-light: #F0EDE8;
18
 
19
--rose: #D8B4B4; /* Dusty Rose — primary accent */
20
--rose-dark: #C8A0A0; /* Hover state */
21
--rose-soft: rgba(216, 180, 180, 0.15);
22
--sage: #DCE8DF; /* Muted Sage */
23
--sage-dark: #C4D9C8;
24
--lavender: #DCCFEA; /* Soft Lavender — optional accent */
25
 
26
--text: #2E2E2E; /* Charcoal */
27
--text-muted: #7A7068; /* Warm medium */
28
--text-faint: #B0A89E; /* Lightest readable */
29
 
30
/* ── Typography ── */
31
--font-display: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
32
--font-body: 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif;
33
 
34
/* Type scale */
35
--text-xs: 0.6875rem; /* 11px */
36
--text-sm: 0.8125rem; /* 13px */
37
--text-base: 0.9375rem; /* 15px */
38
--text-md: 1.0625rem; /* 17px */
39
--text-lg: 1.25rem;
40
--text-xl: 1.5rem;
41
--text-2xl: 2rem;
42
--text-3xl: 2.75rem;
43
--text-4xl: 3.75rem;
44
--text-5xl: 5rem;
45
 
46
/* Spacing */
47
--sp-1: 0.25rem;
48
--sp-2: 0.5rem;
49
--sp-3: 0.75rem;
50
--sp-4: 1rem;
51
--sp-5: 1.25rem;
52
--sp-6: 1.5rem;
53
--sp-8: 2rem;
54
--sp-10: 2.5rem;
55
--sp-12: 3rem;
56
--sp-16: 4rem;
57
--sp-20: 5rem;
58
--sp-24: 6rem;
59
--sp-32: 8rem;
60
 
61
/* Radii */
62
--r-sm: 6px;
63
--r-md: 12px;
64
--r-lg: 18px;
65
--r-xl: 24px;
66
--r-full: 9999px;
67
 
68
/* Shadows (warm-tinted) */
69
--shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px rgba(46,32,20,0.04);
70
--shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(46,32,20,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(46,32,20,0.04);
71
--shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(46,32,20,0.07), 0 1px 3px rgba(46,32,20,0.04);
72
--shadow-lg: 0 12px 32px rgba(46,32,20,0.09), 0 3px 8px rgba(46,32,20,0.05);
73
--shadow-xl: 0 24px 48px rgba(46,32,20,0.11), 0 6px 16px rgba(46,32,20,0.06);
74
 
75
/* Motion */
76
--ease-smooth: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94);
77
--ease-out: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
78
--dur-fast: 140ms;
79
--dur-base: 260ms;
80
--dur-slow: 420ms;
81
 
82
/* Layout */
83
--nav-h: 60px;
84
--max-w: 1100px;
85
--gap-section: var(--sp-24);
86
}
87
 
88
/* ── Dark Mode (cozy luxury, not "dev mode") ── */
89
[data-theme="dark"] {
90
--bg: #1A1714; /* Deep warm charcoal */
91
--bg-alt: #221F1B;
92
--surface: #2A2520; /* Dark taupe card */
93
--surface-warm: #231F1B;
94
--border: #38312A;
95
--border-light: #2F2B25;
96
 
97
--rose: #C4A4A4; /* Dusty rose, lifted for dark */
98
--rose-dark: #D4B4B4;
99
--rose-soft: rgba(196, 164, 164, 0.12);
100
--sage: #8DAF94; /* Brighter sage so it reads on dark */
101
--sage-dark: #9EC0A6;
102
--lavender: #B8A8D0;
103
 
104
--text: #F0EBE3; /* Warm white */
105
--text-muted: #A09080;
106
--text-faint: #6A5E52;
107
 
108
--shadow-xs: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
109
--shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
110
--shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
111
--shadow-lg: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
112
--shadow-xl: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.45);
113
}
114
 
115
 
116
/* ── 2. RESET ──────────────────────────────────────── */
117
 
118
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
119
 
120
html {
121
scroll-behavior: smooth;
122
scroll-padding-top: calc(var(--nav-h) + 20px);
123
-webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
124
}
125
 
126
body {
127
font-family: var(--font-body);
128
font-size: var(--text-base);
129
line-height: 1.65;
130
color: var(--text);
131
background: var(--bg);
132
overflow-x: hidden;
133
transition:
134
background var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-smooth),
135
color var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-smooth);
136
}
137
 
138
img { display: block; max-width: 100%; height: auto; }
139
a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; }
140
ul, ol { list-style: none; }
141
button { font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
142
 
143
/* Accessibility */
144
:focus-visible {
145
outline: 2px solid var(--rose);
146
outline-offset: 3px;
147
border-radius: var(--r-sm);
148
}
149
 
150
.skip-link {
151
position: fixed;
152
top: var(--sp-4);
153
left: var(--sp-4);
154
z-index: 9999;
155
padding: var(--sp-2) var(--sp-4);
156
background: var(--rose);
157
color: #fff;
158
border-radius: var(--r-md);
159
font-size: var(--text-sm);
160
font-weight: 500;
161
transform: translateY(-200%);
162
transition: transform var(--dur-base);
163
}
164
.skip-link:focus { transform: translateY(0); }
165
 
166
/* Reduced motion */
167
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
168
*, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; }
169
html { scroll-behavior: auto; }
170
.fade-up { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; transition: none !important; }
171
}
172
 
173
 
174
/* ── 3. LAYOUT UTILITIES ───────────────────────────── */
175
 
176
.container {
177
width: 100%;
178
max-width: var(--max-w);
179
margin-inline: auto;
180
padding-inline: var(--sp-6);
181
}
182
 
183
@media (min-width: 768px) { .container { padding-inline: var(--sp-10); } }
184
 
185
.section {
186
padding-block: var(--gap-section);
187
}
188
 
189
.section-label {
190
font-family: var(--font-body);
191
font-size: var(--text-xs);
192
font-weight: 600;
193
letter-spacing: 0.12em;
194
text-transform: uppercase;
195
color: var(--rose);
196
margin-bottom: var(--sp-5);
197
}
198
 
199
.section-heading {
200
font-family: var(--font-display);
201
font-size: clamp(var(--text-2xl), 4vw, var(--text-4xl));
202
font-weight: 300;
203
line-height: 1.1;
204
letter-spacing: -0.02em;
205
color: var(--text);
206
margin-bottom: var(--sp-10);
207
}
208
 
209
 
210
/* ── 4. SCROLL ANIMATIONS ──────────────────────────── */
211
 
212
.fade-up {
213
opacity: 0;
214
transform: translateY(22px);
215
transition:
216
opacity 0.7s var(--ease-out),
217
transform 0.7s var(--ease-out);
218
}
219
.delay-1 { transition-delay: 120ms; }
220
.delay-2 { transition-delay: 240ms; }
221
.delay-3 { transition-delay: 360ms; }
222
 
223
.fade-up.visible {
224
opacity: 1;
225
transform: translateY(0);
226
}
227
 
228
 
229
/* ── 5. BUTTONS ────────────────────────────────────── */
230
 
231
.btn {
232
display: inline-flex;
233
align-items: center;
234
gap: var(--sp-2);
235
padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
236
border-radius: var(--r-full);
237
font-size: var(--text-sm);
238
font-weight: 500;
239
letter-spacing: 0.02em;
240
transition: all var(--dur-base) var(--ease-out);
241
white-space: nowrap;
242
}
243
 
244
.btn-primary {
245
background: var(--rose);
246
color: #fff;
247
box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(216,180,180,0.3);
248
}
249
.btn-primary:hover {
250
background: var(--rose-dark);
251
transform: translateY(-1px);
252
box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(216,180,180,0.35);
253
}
254
.btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }
255
 
256
.btn-ghost {
257
color: var(--text-muted);
258
border: 1px solid var(--border);
259
background: transparent;
260
}
261
.btn-ghost:hover {
262
color: var(--text);
263
border-color: var(--rose);
264
background: var(--rose-soft);
265
transform: translateY(-1px);
266
}
267
 
268
[data-theme="dark"] .btn-primary { box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(196,164,164,0.2); }
269
[data-theme="dark"] .btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(196,164,164,0.25); }
270
 
271
 
272
/* ── 6. NAVIGATION ─────────────────────────────────── */
273
 
274
.site-header {
275
position: fixed;
276
inset: 0 0 auto;
277
z-index: 100;
278
height: var(--nav-h);
279
transition:
280
background var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-smooth),
281
border-color var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-smooth),
282
box-shadow var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-smooth);
283
border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
284
}
285
 
286
.site-header.scrolled {
287
background: rgba(250, 248, 245, 0.9);
288
border-color: var(--border);
289
box-shadow: var(--shadow-xs);
290
backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(160%);
291
-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(160%);
292
}
293
[data-theme="dark"] .site-header.scrolled {
294
background: rgba(26, 23, 20, 0.92);
295
}
296
 
297
.nav {
298
display: flex;
299
align-items: center;
300
justify-content: space-between;
301
height: var(--nav-h);
302
max-width: var(--max-w);
303
margin-inline: auto;
304
padding-inline: var(--sp-6);
305
}
306
@media (min-width: 768px) { .nav { padding-inline: var(--sp-10); } }
307
 
308
/* Wordmark */
309
.nav-wordmark {
310
font-family: var(--font-display);
311
font-size: var(--text-lg);
312
font-weight: 400;
313
font-style: italic;
314
letter-spacing: -0.01em;
315
color: var(--text);
316
transition: color var(--dur-base);
317
}
318
.nav-wordmark:hover { color: var(--rose); }
319
 
320
/* Desktop links */
321
.nav-links {
322
display: none;
323
align-items: center;
324
gap: var(--sp-1);
325
}
326
@media (min-width: 768px) { .nav-links { display: flex; } }
327
 
328
.nav-link {
329
position: relative;
330
padding: var(--sp-2) var(--sp-3);
331
font-size: var(--text-sm);
332
font-weight: 400;
333
color: var(--text-muted);
334
border-radius: var(--r-sm);
335
transition: color var(--dur-base);
336
}
337
 
338
/* Animated underline */
339
.nav-link::after {
340
content: '';
341
position: absolute;
342
bottom: 3px;
343
left: var(--sp-3);
344
right: var(--sp-3);
345
height: 1px;
346
background: var(--rose);
347
transform: scaleX(0);
348
transform-origin: left;
349
transition: transform var(--dur-base) var(--ease-out);
350
}
351
.nav-link:hover,
352
.nav-link.active { color: var(--text); }
353
.nav-link:hover::after,
354
.nav-link.active::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
355
 
356
/* Controls */
357
.nav-actions {
358
display: flex;
359
align-items: center;
360
gap: var(--sp-2);
361
}
362
 
363
/* Theme toggle */
364
.theme-toggle {
365
display: grid;
366
place-items: center;
367
width: 34px;
368
height: 34px;
369
border-radius: var(--r-sm);
370
color: var(--text-muted);
371
transition: color var(--dur-base), background var(--dur-base);
372
}
373
.theme-toggle:hover { color: var(--text); background: var(--rose-soft); }
374
 
375
.icon-sun { display: none; }
376
.icon-moon { display: block; }
377
[data-theme="dark"] .icon-sun { display: block; }
378
[data-theme="dark"] .icon-moon { display: none; }
379
 
380
/* Hamburger */
381
.hamburger {
382
display: flex;
383
flex-direction: column;
384
justify-content: center;
385
gap: 5px;
386
width: 34px;
387
height: 34px;
388
border-radius: var(--r-sm);
389
padding: 6px;
390
color: var(--text);
391
transition: background var(--dur-base);
392
}
393
.hamburger:hover { background: var(--rose-soft); }
394
 
395
@media (min-width: 768px) { .hamburger { display: none; } }
396
 
397
.hamburger span {
398
display: block;
399
height: 1.5px;
400
background: currentColor;
401
border-radius: 2px;
402
transition: all var(--dur-base) var(--ease-out);
403
}
404
.hamburger span:first-child { width: 18px; }
405
.hamburger span:last-child { width: 12px; }
406
.hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] span:first-child {
407
transform: translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg);
408
width: 18px;
409
}
410
.hamburger[aria-expanded="true"] span:last-child {
411
transform: translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg);
412
width: 18px;
413
}
414
 
415
/* Mobile nav */
416
.mobile-nav {
417
display: none;
418
flex-direction: column;
419
background: var(--bg);
420
border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
421
padding: var(--sp-4) var(--sp-6) var(--sp-8);
422
}
423
.mobile-nav.open { display: flex; }
424
 
425
.mobile-nav-link {
426
display: block;
427
padding: var(--sp-4) 0;
428
font-size: var(--text-lg);
429
font-weight: 300;
430
color: var(--text-muted);
431
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
432
transition: color var(--dur-base);
433
}
434
.mobile-nav-link:hover { color: var(--rose); }
435
.mobile-nav-cta {
436
color: var(--rose);
437
font-weight: 500;
438
border-bottom: none;
439
margin-top: var(--sp-4);
440
}
441
 
442
 
443
/* ── 7. HERO ───────────────────────────────────────── */
444
 
445
.hero {
446
position: relative;
447
min-height: 100svh;
448
display: flex;
449
align-items: center;
450
padding-top: var(--nav-h);
451
padding-bottom: var(--sp-20);
452
overflow: hidden;
453
}
454
 
455
/* Subtle decorative background texture — rose + sage soft ovals */
456
.hero::before,
457
.hero::after {
458
content: '';
459
position: absolute;
460
border-radius: 50%;
461
pointer-events: none;
462
z-index: 0;
463
}
464
.hero::before {
465
width: 560px;
466
height: 420px;
467
top: -100px;
468
right: -180px;
469
background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(216,180,180,0.14) 0%, transparent 70%);
470
}
471
.hero::after {
472
width: 420px;
473
height: 320px;
474
bottom: 0;
475
left: -120px;
476
background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(220,232,223,0.2) 0%, transparent 70%);
477
}
478
 
479
.hero-inner {
480
position: relative;
481
z-index: 1;
482
max-width: var(--max-w);
483
margin-inline: auto;
484
padding-inline: var(--sp-6);
485
width: 100%;
486
}
487
@media (min-width: 768px) { .hero-inner { padding-inline: var(--sp-10); } }
488
 
489
.hero-discipline {
490
display: flex;
491
flex-wrap: wrap;
492
align-items: center;
493
gap: var(--sp-2) var(--sp-3);
494
font-size: var(--text-xs);
495
font-weight: 500;
496
letter-spacing: 0.12em;
497
text-transform: uppercase;
498
color: var(--rose);
499
margin-bottom: var(--sp-8);
500
}
501
.sep { color: var(--border); }
502
 
503
/* Hero name: Cormorant Garamond, very large, italic on surname */
504
.hero-name {
505
font-family: var(--font-display);
506
font-size: clamp(var(--text-3xl), 9vw, var(--text-5xl));
507
font-weight: 300;
508
line-height: 0.95;
509
letter-spacing: -0.03em;
510
color: var(--text);
511
margin-bottom: var(--sp-8);
512
}
513
.hero-name em {
514
font-style: italic;
515
color: var(--rose);
516
}
517
 
518
.hero-tagline {
519
font-size: clamp(var(--text-base), 2vw, var(--text-md));
520
font-weight: 300;
521
color: var(--text-muted);
522
line-height: 1.7;
523
max-width: 480px;
524
margin-bottom: var(--sp-10);
525
}
526
.br-desktop { display: none; }
527
@media (min-width: 768px) { .br-desktop { display: block; } }
528
 
529
.hero-actions {
530
display: flex;
531
flex-wrap: wrap;
532
gap: var(--sp-3);
533
}
534
 
535
.hero-rule {
536
position: absolute;
537
bottom: var(--sp-12);
538
left: var(--sp-6);
539
right: var(--sp-6);
540
height: 1px;
541
background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--border), transparent 60%);
542
z-index: 1;
543
}
544
 
545
 
546
/* ── 8. ABOUT ──────────────────────────────────────── */
547
 
548
.about {
549
background: var(--bg-alt);
550
}
551
 
552
.about-grid {
553
display: grid;
554
gap: var(--sp-12);
555
}
556
@media (min-width: 900px) {
557
.about-grid {
558
grid-template-columns: 320px 1fr;
559
gap: var(--sp-16);
560
align-items: start;
561
}
562
}
563
 
564
/* Photo frame */
565
.about-photo-col {
566
display: flex;
567
justify-content: center;
568
}
569
@media (min-width: 900px) { .about-photo-col { justify-content: flex-start; } }
570
 
571
.about-photo-frame {
572
width: 260px;
573
height: 320px;
574
border-radius: var(--r-xl);
575
overflow: hidden;
576
background: var(--surface);
577
box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
578
flex-shrink: 0;
579
}
580
@media (min-width: 900px) {
581
.about-photo-frame { width: 300px; height: 380px; }
582
}
583
 
584
.about-photo {
585
width: 100%;
586
height: 100%;
587
object-fit: cover;
588
object-position: center top;
589
transition: transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out);
590
}
591
.about-photo-frame:hover .about-photo { transform: scale(1.04); }
592
 
593
/* Placeholder when photo missing */
594
.photo-empty {
595
display: flex;
596
align-items: center;
597
justify-content: center;
598
font-size: var(--text-sm);
599
color: var(--text-faint);
600
}
601
.photo-empty::after { content: '📸 photo.jpg'; }
602
 
603
/* About text */
604
.about-text-col .section-heading { margin-bottom: var(--sp-6); }
605
 
606
.about-body {
607
display: flex;
608
flex-direction: column;
609
gap: var(--sp-4);
610
margin-bottom: var(--sp-8);
611
}
612
.about-body p {
613
font-size: var(--text-base);
614
font-weight: 300;
615
color: var(--text-muted);
616
line-height: 1.8;
617
}
618
.about-body strong {
619
color: var(--text);
620
font-weight: 500;
621
}
622
 
623
/* Skill chips */
624
.skills {
625
display: flex;
626
flex-wrap: wrap;
627
gap: var(--sp-2);
628
}
629
.chip {
630
padding: 0.375rem 0.875rem;
631
border-radius: var(--r-full);
632
font-size: var(--text-xs);
633
font-weight: 500;
634
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
635
color: var(--text-muted);
636
background: var(--surface);
637
border: 1px solid var(--border);
638
transition: all var(--dur-base);
639
cursor: default;
640
}
641
.chip:hover {
642
border-color: var(--rose);
643
color: var(--rose);
644
background: var(--rose-soft);
645
}
646
 
647
 
648
/* ── 9. EXPERIENCE ─────────────────────────────────── */
649
 
650
.timeline {
651
position: relative;
652
padding-left: var(--sp-8);
653
max-width: 780px;
654
}
655
 
656
.timeline-spine {
657
position: absolute;
658
top: 10px;
659
left: 11px;
660
bottom: 10px;
661
width: 1px;
662
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--rose), var(--border) 80%);
663
}
664
 
665
.timeline-item { position: relative; }
666
 
667
.timeline-dot {
668
position: absolute;
669
top: 10px;
670
left: calc(-1 * var(--sp-8) + 5px);
671
width: 13px;
672
height: 13px;
673
border-radius: 50%;
674
background: var(--bg);
675
border: 2px solid var(--rose);
676
z-index: 1;
677
transition: background var(--dur-base);
678
}
679
.timeline-item:hover .timeline-dot { background: var(--rose); }
680
 
681
.timeline-card {
682
background: var(--surface);
683
border: 1px solid var(--border);
684
border-radius: var(--r-lg);
685
padding: var(--sp-6) var(--sp-8);
686
box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
687
transition:
688
box-shadow var(--dur-base),
689
transform var(--dur-base),
690
border-color var(--dur-base);
691
}
692
.timeline-card:hover {
693
box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
694
transform: translateY(-2px);
695
border-color: rgba(216,180,180,0.5);
696
}
697
 
698
.timeline-card-top {
699
display: flex;
700
flex-direction: column;
701
gap: var(--sp-2);
702
margin-bottom: var(--sp-4);
703
}
704
@media (min-width: 580px) {
705
.timeline-card-top {
706
flex-direction: row;
707
justify-content: space-between;
708
align-items: flex-start;
709
}
710
}
711
 
712
.timeline-company {
713
font-size: var(--text-xs);
714
font-weight: 600;
715
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
716
text-transform: uppercase;
717
color: var(--rose);
718
margin-bottom: var(--sp-1);
719
}
720
.timeline-role {
721
font-size: var(--text-md);
722
font-weight: 500;
723
color: var(--text);
724
}
725
.timeline-period {
726
font-size: var(--text-xs);
727
font-weight: 500;
728
color: var(--text-faint);
729
padding: var(--sp-1) var(--sp-3);
730
background: var(--rose-soft);
731
border-radius: var(--r-full);
732
height: fit-content;
733
white-space: nowrap;
734
}
735
 
736
.timeline-desc {
737
font-size: var(--text-sm);
738
font-weight: 300;
739
color: var(--text-muted);
740
line-height: 1.75;
741
margin-bottom: var(--sp-5);
742
}
743
 
744
.timeline-tags {
745
display: flex;
746
flex-wrap: wrap;
747
gap: var(--sp-2);
748
}
749
.tag {
750
font-size: 11px;
751
font-weight: 500;
752
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
753
color: var(--text-faint);
754
padding: 2px 10px;
755
border-radius: var(--r-full);
756
background: var(--bg);
757
border: 1px solid var(--border);
758
}
759
 
760
 
761
/* ── 10. PROJECTS ──────────────────────────────────── */
762
 
763
.projects { background: var(--bg-alt); }
764
 
765
.projects-grid {
766
display: grid;
767
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
768
gap: var(--sp-6);
769
}
770
@media (min-width: 640px) { .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
771
@media (min-width: 1024px) { .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } }
772
 
773
.project-card {
774
display: flex;
775
flex-direction: column;
776
background: var(--surface);
777
border: 1px solid var(--border);
778
border-radius: var(--r-xl);
779
overflow: hidden;
780
box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
781
transition:
782
box-shadow var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out),
783
transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out),
784
border-color var(--dur-base);
785
}
786
.project-card:hover {
787
box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
788
transform: translateY(-4px);
789
border-color: rgba(216,180,180,0.4);
790
}
791
 
792
.project-img-wrap {
793
position: relative;
794
height: 190px;
795
overflow: hidden;
796
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-alt) 0%, var(--border-light) 100%);
797
}
798
.project-img {
799
width: 100%;
800
height: 100%;
801
object-fit: cover;
802
transition: transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out);
803
}
804
.project-card:hover .project-img { transform: scale(1.05); }
805
 
806
.img-empty {
807
display: flex;
808
align-items: center;
809
justify-content: center;
810
height: 190px;
811
color: var(--text-faint);
812
font-size: var(--text-sm);
813
}
814
.img-empty::after { content: '📸 project image'; }
815
 
816
.project-badge {
817
position: absolute;
818
top: var(--sp-3);
819
left: var(--sp-3);
820
font-size: 10px;
821
font-weight: 600;
822
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
823
text-transform: uppercase;
824
color: var(--rose);
825
background: var(--surface);
826
border: 1px solid rgba(216,180,180,0.4);
827
border-radius: var(--r-full);
828
padding: 2px 10px;
829
}
830
 
831
.project-body {
832
flex: 1;
833
padding: var(--sp-5) var(--sp-5) var(--sp-4);
834
}
835
.project-title {
836
font-size: var(--text-md);
837
font-weight: 500;
838
color: var(--text);
839
margin-bottom: var(--sp-2);
840
line-height: 1.3;
841
}
842
.project-desc {
843
font-size: var(--text-sm);
844
font-weight: 300;
845
color: var(--text-muted);
846
line-height: 1.7;
847
margin-bottom: var(--sp-4);
848
}
849
.project-tools {
850
display: flex;
851
flex-wrap: wrap;
852
gap: var(--sp-2);
853
}
854
.tool {
855
font-size: 11px;
856
font-weight: 500;
857
color: var(--text-faint);
858
background: var(--bg);
859
border: 1px solid var(--border);
860
border-radius: var(--r-full);
861
padding: 2px 10px;
862
}
863
 
864
.project-footer {
865
padding: var(--sp-4) var(--sp-5);
866
border-top: 1px solid var(--border-light);
867
}
868
.project-link {
869
font-size: var(--text-sm);
870
font-weight: 500;
871
color: var(--rose);
872
display: inline-flex;
873
gap: var(--sp-2);
874
transition: gap var(--dur-fast);
875
}
876
.project-link:hover { gap: var(--sp-3); }
877
 
878
 
879
/* ── 11. BUSINESS JOURNAL ──────────────────────────── */
880
 
881
/* The signature element: editorial large-format grid */
882
.journal { background: var(--bg); }
883
 
884
.journal-header {
885
display: flex;
886
align-items: flex-start;
887
justify-content: space-between;
888
margin-bottom: var(--sp-12);
889
}
890
 
891
.journal-subhead {
892
font-size: var(--text-sm);
893
font-weight: 300;
894
color: var(--text-muted);
895
line-height: 1.7;
896
max-width: 420px;
897
margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--sp-6));
898
}
899
 
900
/* Grid: first card spans full width (featured editorial), rest 2-col */
901
.journal-grid {
902
display: grid;
903
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
904
gap: var(--sp-6);
905
}
906
@media (min-width: 768px) {
907
.journal-grid {
908
grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
909
}
910
/* Featured card spans both columns */
911
.journal-card--featured {
912
grid-column: 1 / -1;
913
display: grid;
914
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
915
gap: 0;
916
min-height: 360px;
917
}
918
}
919
 
920
.journal-card {
921
background: var(--surface);
922
border: 1px solid var(--border);
923
border-radius: var(--r-xl);
924
overflow: hidden;
925
display: flex;
926
flex-direction: column;
927
box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
928
transition:
929
box-shadow var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out),
930
transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out),
931
border-color var(--dur-base);
932
}
933
.journal-card:hover {
934
box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
935
transform: translateY(-3px);
936
border-color: rgba(220,207,234,0.6); /* lavender tint on hover */
937
}
938
 
939
.journal-img-wrap {
940
position: relative;
941
height: 210px;
942
overflow: hidden;
943
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-alt) 0%, var(--border-light) 100%);
944
flex-shrink: 0;
945
}
946
@media (min-width: 768px) {
947
.journal-card--featured .journal-img-wrap {
948
height: 100%;
949
min-height: 320px;
950
}
951
}
952
 
953
.journal-img {
954
width: 100%;
955
height: 100%;
956
object-fit: cover;
957
transition: transform var(--dur-slow) var(--ease-out);
958
}
959
.journal-card:hover .journal-img { transform: scale(1.04); }
960
 
961
/* Image placeholder */
962
.journal-img-wrap.img-empty::after {
963
content: '📸 journal image';
964
position: absolute;
965
inset: 0;
966
display: flex;
967
align-items: center;
968
justify-content: center;
969
color: var(--text-faint);
970
font-size: var(--text-sm);
971
}
972
 
973
.journal-body {
974
flex: 1;
975
padding: var(--sp-6) var(--sp-6) var(--sp-5);
976
display: flex;
977
flex-direction: column;
978
}
979
@media (min-width: 768px) {
980
.journal-card--featured .journal-body {
981
padding: var(--sp-10) var(--sp-10);
982
justify-content: center;
983
}
984
}
985
 
986
.journal-meta {
987
display: flex;
988
align-items: center;
989
gap: var(--sp-3);
990
margin-bottom: var(--sp-3);
991
}
992
.journal-category {
993
font-size: var(--text-xs);
994
font-weight: 600;
995
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
996
text-transform: uppercase;
997
color: var(--rose);
998
}
999
.journal-time {
1000
font-size: var(--text-xs);
1001
color: var(--text-faint);
1002
}
1003
 
1004
.journal-title {
1005
font-family: var(--font-display);
1006
font-size: var(--text-xl);
1007
font-weight: 400;
1008
line-height: 1.2;
1009
color: var(--text);
1010
margin-bottom: var(--sp-3);
1011
letter-spacing: -0.01em;
1012
}
1013
@media (min-width: 768px) {
1014
.journal-card--featured .journal-title {
1015
font-size: var(--text-2xl);
1016
margin-bottom: var(--sp-4);
1017
}
1018
}
1019
 
1020
.journal-desc {
1021
font-size: var(--text-sm);
1022
font-weight: 300;
1023
color: var(--text-muted);
1024
line-height: 1.75;
1025
flex: 1;
1026
margin-bottom: var(--sp-5);
1027
}
1028
 
1029
.journal-link {
1030
font-size: var(--text-sm);
1031
font-weight: 500;
1032
color: var(--rose);
1033
display: inline-flex;
1034
gap: var(--sp-2);
1035
align-self: flex-start;
1036
transition: gap var(--dur-fast);
1037
}
1038
.journal-link:hover { gap: var(--sp-3); }
1039
 
1040
 
1041
/* ── 12. CONTACT ───────────────────────────────────── */
1042
 
1043
.contact { background: var(--bg-alt); }
1044
 
1045
.contact-intro {
1046
font-size: var(--text-base);
1047
font-weight: 300;
1048
color: var(--text-muted);
1049
max-width: 480px;
1050
line-height: 1.8;
1051
margin-bottom: var(--sp-10);
1052
margin-top: calc(-1 * var(--sp-5));
1053
}
1054
 
1055
.contact-cards {
1056
display: grid;
1057
grid-template-columns: 1fr;
1058
gap: var(--sp-4);
1059
max-width: 560px;
1060
}
1061
@media (min-width: 640px) {
1062
.contact-cards { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
1063
}
1064
 
1065
.contact-card {
1066
display: flex;
1067
align-items: center;
1068
gap: var(--sp-4);
1069
padding: var(--sp-5) var(--sp-5);
1070
background: var(--surface);
1071
border: 1px solid var(--border);
1072
border-radius: var(--r-lg);
1073
box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
1074
transition: all var(--dur-base) var(--ease-out);
1075
}
1076
.contact-card:hover {
1077
border-color: var(--rose);
1078
box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
1079
transform: translateY(-2px);
1080
}
1081
/* Last card (Resume) spans full width on 2-col */
1082
@media (min-width: 640px) {
1083
.contact-card:last-child { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
1084
}
1085
 
1086
.contact-card-icon {
1087
display: grid;
1088
place-items: center;
1089
width: 40px;
1090
height: 40px;
1091
border-radius: var(--r-md);
1092
background: var(--rose-soft);
1093
color: var(--rose);
1094
flex-shrink: 0;
1095
transition: background var(--dur-base);
1096
}
1097
.contact-card:hover .contact-card-icon {
1098
background: var(--rose);
1099
color: #fff;
1100
}
1101
 
1102
.contact-card-label {
1103
font-size: var(--text-xs);
1104
font-weight: 600;
1105
letter-spacing: 0.06em;
1106
text-transform: uppercase;
1107
color: var(--text-faint);
1108
margin-bottom: 2px;
1109
}
1110
.contact-card-value {
1111
font-size: var(--text-sm);
1112
font-weight: 500;
1113
color: var(--text);
1114
}
1115
 
1116
 
1117
/* ── 13. FOOTER ────────────────────────────────────── */
1118
 
1119
.footer {
1120
border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
1121
padding-block: var(--sp-8);
1122
background: var(--bg);
1123
}
1124
 
1125
.footer-inner {
1126
display: flex;
1127
flex-direction: column;
1128
align-items: center;
1129
gap: var(--sp-3);
1130
text-align: center;
1131
}
1132
@media (min-width: 640px) {
1133
.footer-inner {
1134
flex-direction: row;
1135
justify-content: space-between;
1136
text-align: left;
1137
}
1138
}
1139
 
1140
.footer-name {
1141
font-family: var(--font-display);
1142
font-size: var(--text-lg);
1143
font-style: italic;
1144
color: var(--text);
1145
}
1146
.footer-copy {
1147
font-size: var(--text-xs);
1148
color: var(--text-faint);
1149
}
1150
.footer-nav {
1151
